task_completion.description: Load the crambin structure (PDB: 1CRN) into the molecular visualization software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer (or similar software) should be open and displaying the 3D structure of a small protein, with '1CRN' or '1crn' visible in the object menu or command history.

task_completion.description: Color the protein by secondary structure type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The protein structure in the viewer should have distinct colors for helices, beta sheets, and loops (e.g., helices in red, sheets in yellow, loops in green).

task_completion.description: Show the disulfide bonds as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cysteine residues forming the 3 disulfide bonds should be visible in stick representation, distinct from the rest of the protein backbone.

task_completion.description: Measure the sulfur-sulfur (SG-SG) distances for all disulfide bonds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines representing distance measurements should be visible between the sulfur atoms (yellow) of the paired cysteine residues, with labels showing distances around 2.0 to 2.05 Angstroms.

task_completion.description: Save a ray-traced publication-quality figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/crambin_teaching.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The command history, terminal, or file manager should show the image being saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/crambin_teaching.png', potentially with evidence of the 'ray' command being used prior to saving.

task_completion.description: Write a structural report to ~/PyMOL_Data/crambin_structure_report.txt containing the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the creation of 'crambin_structure_report.txt' at the correct path. The text must include: 3 disulfide bonds, pairs (3-40, 4-32, 16-26), distances (~2.0 A), and a summary of helices and sheets.

integrity.description: The agent actually used PyMOL to load, manipulate, and render the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command-line interface being actively used, rather than the agent just downloading a pre-made image from the internet.

integrity.description: The distances reported match the actual measurements taken in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance values written in the text report (around 2.0-2.05 A) should match the labels visible on the dashed measurement lines in the PyMOL viewer screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directories rather than default or temporary locations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands, file explorer windows, or editor save dialogs should explicitly show the paths '~/PyMOL_Data/images/crambin_teaching.png' and '~/PyMOL_Data/crambin_structure_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Crambin (1CRN) contains exactly 3 disulfide bonds. The pairing cysteine residues are 3-40, 4-32, and 16-26. The true SG-SG distances are approximately 2.0 to 2.05 Angstroms (must be between 1.5 and 2.8 A). The figure must be saved to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/crambin_teaching.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/crambin_structure_report.txt.
